parameters.name: user-id
parameters.description: The encoded ID of the user. Use "-" (dash) for current logged-in user.

parameters.name: weight
parameters.description: Weight measurement in the format X.XX.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: The date the weight measurement was recorded in the format yyyy-MM-dd.

parameters.name: time
parameters.description: The timestamp the weight measurement was recorded in the format HH:mm:ss. If a value is not provided, the timestamp will be the last second of the day.

response_fields.name: weightLog : bmi
response_fields.description: Calculated BMI in the format X.XX

response_fields.name: weightLog : date
response_fields.description: Log entry date in the format yyyy-MM-dd

response_fields.name: weightLog : logId
response_fields.description: Weight Log IDs are unique to the user, but not globally unique.

response_fields.name: weightLog : source
response_fields.description: The source of the weight log. See "source" values for more information. Support: API | Aria | AriaAir | Withings

response_fields.name: weightLog : time
response_fields.description: Time of the measurement; hours and minutes in the format HH:mm:ss, set to the last second of the day if not provided.

response_fields.name: weightLog : weight
response_fields.description: Weight in the format X.XX, in the unit system that corresponds to the Accept-Language header provided or if not provided in metric.
